redaction_policy.large_full_text: not copied into playbook; runtime filtered artifacts remain as bounded Host Bridge exports
redaction_policy.local_attachment_paths: not retained; absolute paths redacted if present in command transcripts

runtime_truth_policy: Only runtime/input.json and gate-requested payload JSON were written by the agent inside run workspace; runtime-owned outputs were produced by gate/runtime scripts, then mirrored into this artifact.
